description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a shrimp or prawn, featuring a segmented body with a distinct cephalothorax and elongated abdomen. The exoskeleton is semi-translucent with hues of tan, beige, and light green, and the surface appears hard and slightly glossy. Two prominent claws (chelae) extend from the front, with one noticeably longer than the other, and several slender walking legs are visible beneath the body. Long, thin antennae project forward from the head, adding to the object's delicate appearance. The eyes are small, dark, and positioned on short stalks at the front of the cephalothorax. The overall form is streamlined, typical of aquatic crustaceans, and the object is sized comparably to a large shrimp, as indicated by the color calibration cube.
description: A detailed, life-like shrimp or prawn with a segmented, semi-translucent exoskeleton, long antennae, and two prominent claws.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the body, both claws, and the long antennae extending forward.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of legs, claws, and the segmentation of the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the curvature of the body and the relative size of the claws and antennae.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the spread of the claws, the forward-facing antennae, and the narrow profile of the head.
